briefdescription.para: Check if the Notecard response contains an error.

parameterdescription.para: The response to check.

simplesect.para: true if there's an error and false if there's not.

briefdescription.para: Free a response from the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The response to free.

briefdescription.para: The default I2C address of the Notecard.
The maximum number of bytes to request from or transmit to the Notecard in a single chunk.
The floating point type used for JSON handling in note-c.
The signed integer type used for JSON handling in note-c.
The unsigned integer type used for JSON handling in note-c.
The type for the various mutex (i.e. lock/unlock) hooks.
The type for the memory allocation hook.

parameterdescription.para: The number of bytes to allocate.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the newly allocated memory or NULL on failure.

briefdescription.para: The type for the memory freeing hook.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the memory to free.

briefdescription.para: The type for the millisecond delay hook.

parameterdescription.para: The number of milliseconds to delay for.

briefdescription.para: The type for the millisecond counter hook.

simplesect.para: The value of the millisecond counter.

briefdescription.para: The type for the serial reset hook.

detaileddescription.para: This hook is used to reset the serial peripheral used to communicate with the Notecard.

simplesect.para: true on success and false on failure.

briefdescription.para: The type for the serial transmit hook.

parameterdescription.para: A buffer of bytes to transmit to the Notecard.
The size, in bytes, of txBuf.
If true, flush the serial peripheral's transmit buffer.

briefdescription.para: The type for the serial available hook.

simplesect.para: true if there's data to read and false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: The type for the serial receive hook.

simplesect.para: The received byte.

briefdescription.para: The type for the I2C reset hook.

detaileddescription.para: This hook is used to reset the I2C peripheral used to communicate with the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The I2C address of the Notecard.

briefdescription.para: The type for the I2C transmit hook.

detaileddescription.para: This hook is used to send a buffer of bytes to the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The I2C address of the Notecard to transmit the data to.
A buffer of bytes to transmit to the Notecard.
The size, in bytes, of txBuf.

simplesect.para: NULL on success and an error string on failure.

briefdescription.para: The type for the I2C receive hook.

detaileddescription.para: This hook is used to receive a buffer of bytes from the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The I2C address of the Notecard sending the data to receive.
A buffer to hold the data received from the Notecard.
The size, in bytes, of rxBuf.
The number of bytes remaining to be received, if any.

simplesect.para: NULL on success and an error string on failure.

briefdescription.para: Initialize or re-initialize the module.

simplesect.para: True if the reset was successful and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Mark that a reset will be required before doing further I/O on a given port.
Create a new JSON request.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a dynamically allocated J object with one field "req" whose value is the passed in request string.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the request, for example hub.set.

simplesect.para: A J object with the "req" field populated.

briefdescription.para: Create a new JSON command.

detaileddescription.para: Create a dynamically allocated J object with one field "cmd" whose value is the passed in request string. The difference between a command and a request is that the Notecard does not send a response to commands, only to requests.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the command (e.g. card.attn).

simplesect.para: A J object with the "cmd" field populated.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to the Notecard and return the response.

detaileddescription.para: The passed in request object is always freed, regardless of if the request was successful or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a J request object.

simplesect.para: A J object with the response or NULL if there was an error sending the request.
NoteResponseError to check the response for errors.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to the Notecard, retrying it until it succeeds or it times out, and return the response.

detaileddescription.para: The passed in request object is always freed, regardless of if the request was successful or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a J request object.
Time limit for retires, in seconds, if there is no response, or if the response contains an I/O error.

simplesect.para: A J object with the response or NULL if there was an error sending the request.
NoteResponseError to check the response for errors.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to the Notecard and return the response.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike NoteRequestResponse, this function expects the request to be a valid JSON C-string, rather than a J object. The string is expected to be newline-terminated, otherwise the call produces undefined behavior. The response is returned as a dynamically allocated JSON C-string. The response string is verbatim what was sent by the Notecard, which IS newline-terminated. The caller is responsible for freeing the response string. If the request was a command (i.e. it uses "cmd" instead of "req"), this function returns NULL, because the Notecard does not send a response to commands.

parameterdescription.para: A valid newline-terminated JSON C-string containing the request.

simplesect.para: A newline-terminated JSON C-string with the response, or NULL if there was no response or if there was an error.
When a "cmd" is sent, it is not possible to determine if an error occurred.

briefdescription.para: Suppress showing transaction details.
Resume showing transaction details.
Send a request to the Notecard.

detaileddescription.para: The passed in request object is always freed, regardless of if the request was successful or not. The response from the Notecard, if any, is freed and not returned to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a J request object.

simplesect.para: true if successful and false if an error occurs (e.g. out of memory or the response from the Notecard has an "err" field). If req is a command rather than a request, a true return value indicates that the command was sent without error. However, since the Notecard sends no response to commands, it does not guarantee that the command was received and processed by the Notecard.
NoteRequestResponse if you need to work with the response.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to the Notecard, retrying it until it succeeds or it times out.

detaileddescription.para: The passed in request object is always freed, regardless of if the request was successful or not. The response from the Notecard, if any, is freed and not returned to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a J request object.
Time limit for retires, in seconds, if there is no response, or if the response contains an I/O error.

simplesect.para: true if successful and false if an error occurs (e.g. out of memory or the response from the Notecard has an "err" field).
NoteRequestResponseWithRetry if you need to work with the response.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to the Notecard and return the response.

detaileddescription.para: This function doesn't free the passed in request object. The caller is responsible for freeing it.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a J request object.

simplesect.para: A J object with the response or NULL if there was an error sending the request.
NoteResponseError to check the response for errors.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if a Notecard error is present in a JSON string.

detaileddescription.para: Only Notecard errors enclosed in {} (e.g. {io} for an I/O error) are guaranteed by the API.

parameterdescription.para: The string to check for errors.
The error substring to search for in errstr.

simplesect.para: true if errstr contains errtype and false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Clean error strings out of the specified buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Notecard errors are enclosed in {} (e.g. {io} for an I/O error). This function takes the input string and removes all errors from it, meaning it removes any substrings matching the pattern {some error string}, including the braces.

parameterdescription.para: A C-string to to clean of errors.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific debug output function.

parameterdescription.para: A function pointer to call for debug output.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific transaction initiation/completion fn's.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific transaction initiation function to use.
The platform-specific transaction completion function to use. to use.

memberdef.argsstring: (mutexFn lockI2Cfn, mutexFn unlockI2Cfn, mutexFn lockNotefn, mutexFn unlockNotefn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnMutex

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific mutex functions for I2C and the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific I2C lock function to use.
The platform-specific I2C unlock function to use.
The platform-specific Notecard lock function to use.
The platform-specific Notecard unlock function to use.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific mutex functions for I2C.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific I2C lock function.
The platform-specific I2C unlock function.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific mutex functions for the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific Notecard lock function.
The platform-specific Notecard unlock function.

memberdef.argsstring: (mallocFn mallocfn, freeFn freefn, delayMsFn delayfn, getMsFn millisfn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnDefault

briefdescription.para: Set the default memory and timing hooks if they aren't already set.

parameterdescription.para: The default memory allocation malloc function to use.
The default memory free function to use.
The default delay function to use.
The default 'millis' function to use.

memberdef.argsstring: (mallocFn mallocHook, freeFn freeHook, delayMsFn delayMsHook, getMsFn getMsHook)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFn

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific memory and timing hooks.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific memory allocation function (i.e. malloc).
The platform-specific memory free function (i.e. free).
The platform-specific millisecond delay function.
The platform-specific millisecond counter function.

memberdef.argsstring: (serialResetFn resetFn, serialTransmitFn transmitFn, serialAvailableFn availFn, serialReceiveFn receiveFn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnSerial

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific hooks for communicating with the Notecard over serial.

parameterdescription.para: The platform-specific serial reset function.
The platform-specific serial transmit function.
The platform-specific serial available function.
The platform-specific serial receive function.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t notecardAddr, uint32_t maxTransmitSize, i2cResetFn resetFn, i2cTransmitFn transmitFn, i2cReceiveFn receiveFn)
memberdef.name: NoteSetFnI2C

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific hooks for communicating with the Notecard over I2C, as well as the I2C address of the Notecard and maximum transmission size.

parameterdescription.para: The I2C address of the Notecard. Pass 0 to use the default address.
The max number of bytes to send to the Notecard in a single I2C segment. Pass 0 to use the default maximum transmission size.
The platform-specific I2C reset function.
The platform-specific I2C transmit function.
The platform-specific I2C receive function.

briefdescription.para: Set the platform-specific communications method to be disabled.
Set the I2C address for communication with the Notecard.

parameterdescription.para: the I2C address to use for the Notecard.

memberdef.argsstring: (int cpu_mem, int cpu_mhz, int cpu_cores, char *cpu_vendor, char *cpu_name)
memberdef.name: NoteSetUserAgentCPU

briefdescription.para: Write to the debug stream.

parameterdescription.para: A debug string for output.

briefdescription.para: Write text to the debug stream and output a newline.

parameterdescription.para: A debug string for output.

briefdescription.para: Write a number to the debug stream and output a newline.

parameterdescription.para: A debug string for output.
The number to write.

briefdescription.para: Write the message to the debug stream, if the level is less than or equal to NOTE_C_LOG_LEVEL. Otherwise, the message is dropped.

parameterdescription.para: The log level of the message. See the NOTE_C_LOG_LEVEL_* macros in note.h for possible values.
The debug message.

briefdescription.para: Same as NoteDebugWithLevel, but add a newline at the end.

parameterdescription.para: The log level of the message. See the NOTE_C_LOG_LEVEL_* macros in note.h for possible values.
The debug message.

briefdescription.para: Allocate a memory chunk using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: the number of bytes to allocate.

briefdescription.para: Free memory using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to the memory address to free.

briefdescription.para: Get the current milliseconds value from the platform-specific hook.

simplesect.para: The current milliseconds value.

briefdescription.para: Delay milliseconds using the platform-specific hook.

parameterdescription.para: the milliseconds delay value.

briefdescription.para: Lock the I2C bus using the platform-specific hook.
Unlock the I2C bus using the platform-specific hook.
Get the I2C address of the Notecard.

simplesect.para: The current I2C address.

briefdescription.para: Determine the maximum number of bytes for each segment of data sent to the Notecard over I2C.

simplesect.para: A 32-bit integer of the maximum number of bytes per I2C segment.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a field is present in a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The field to find.

simplesect.para: True if the field is present, or false if the field is not present or the JSON object is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of a string field from a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The string field to query.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the string if the field exists and is a string, otherwise the empty string ("").
The returned string is a pointer to the string contained in the JSON object. It is not a copy of the string, so once the JSON object is freed, the pointer is no longer valid.

briefdescription.para: Get the floating point value of a number field from a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The number field to query.

simplesect.para: The value of the number field if the field exists and is a number, otherwise 0.0.
The returned value is the floating point representation of the number.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of an array field from a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The array field to query.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the array, which is itself a JSON object (J *), if the field exists and is an array, otherwise NULL.
The returned JSON object is a pointer to the array contained in the parent JSON object. It is not a copy, so once the parent JSON object is freed, the pointer is no longer valid.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of an object field from a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The object field to query.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the object, which is itself a JSON object (J *), if the field exists and is an object, otherwise NULL.
The returned JSON object is a pointer to the object contained in the parent JSON object. It is not a copy, so once the parent JSON object is freed, the pointer is no longer valid.

briefdescription.para: Get the integer value of a number field from a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The number field to query.

simplesect.para: The value of the number field if the field exists and is a number, otherwise 0.
The returned value is the integer representation of the number.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of a boolean field from a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The boolean field to query.

simplesect.para: The value of the boolean field if it exists and is a boolean, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Return the number representation of an item.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON item.

simplesect.para: The number, or 0.0, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Return the string representation of an item.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON item.

simplesect.para: The string value, or empty string, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Return the boolean representation of an item.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON item.

simplesect.para: The boolean value.

briefdescription.para: Return the integer representation of an item.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON item.

simplesect.para: The number, or 0, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a JSON object is valid and if a field is not present, or null.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON response object.
The field to return.

simplesect.para: bool. False if the field is not present, or NULL.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a field exists, is a string and matches a provided value.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON response object.
The field to check.
The string to test against the returned value.

simplesect.para: bol. Whether the fields match exactly.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a field exists, is a string and contains a provided value.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON response object.
The field to check.
The string to test against the returned value.

simplesect.para: bol. Whether the provided string is found within the field.

memberdef.argsstring: (J *json, const char *fieldName, const void *binaryData, uint32_t binaryDataLen)
memberdef.name: JAddBinaryToObject

briefdescription.para: Add binary data as a Base64-encoded string field to a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The name to use for the field.
A buffer of binary data to encode.
The length of the binary data in bytes.

simplesect.para: True if the string was successfully encoded and added to the object, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Decode a Base64-encoded string field in a JSON object and return the decoded bytes.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.
The name of the field.
A pointer to a pointer, used to hold the pointer to the decoded bytes.
A pointer to an unsigned integer, used to hold the length of the decoded bytes.

simplesect.para: True if the string was successfully decoded and returned, otherwise false.
The returned binary buffer must be freed by the user with JFree when it is no longer needed.
On error, the returned binary buffer and data length shall be set to NULL and zero (0), respectively.

briefdescription.para: Get the object name.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object.

simplesect.para: The name, or the empty string, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Convert a buffer/len to a null-terminated c-string.

parameterdescription.para: A buffer containing the bytes to convert.
The length of buffer in bytes.

simplesect.para: If buffer is NULL or length 0, the empty string. If allocation fails, NULL. On success, the converted c-string. The returned string must be freed with NoteFree.

briefdescription.para: Return the type of an item, as a string.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON item.

simplesect.para: The type

briefdescription.para: Get the type of a field, as an int usable in a switch statement.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object containing the field.
The field's name.

simplesect.para: The type of the field on success. JTYPE_NOT_PRESENT on error or if the field doesn't exist.

briefdescription.para: Convert an integer to text.

parameterdescription.para: The integer to convert.
The buffer to hold the text.

simplesect.para: The buffer must be large enough because no bounds checking is done.

briefdescription.para: Convert text to an integer.

parameterdescription.para: A null-terminated text buffer

simplesect.para: An integer, or 0 if invalid

memberdef.argsstring: (NoteMD5Context *ctx, unsigned char const *buf, unsigned long len)
memberdef.name: NoteMD5Update

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned long buf[4], const unsigned char inraw[64])
memberdef.name: NoteMD5Transform

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *data, unsigned long len, unsigned char *retHash)
memberdef.name: NoteMD5Hash

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *data, unsigned long len, char *strbuf, unsigned long buflen)
memberdef.name: NoteMD5HashString

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t *encData, uint32_t encDataLen, uint8_t *decBuf, uint32_t decBufSize)
memberdef.name: NoteBinaryCodecDecode

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t *decData, uint32_t decDataLen, uint8_t *encBuf, uint32_t encBufSize)
memberdef.name: NoteBinaryCodecEncode

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *buffer, uint32_t bufLen, uint32_t decodedOffset, uint32_t decodedLen)
memberdef.name: NoteBinaryStoreReceive

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *unencodedData, uint32_t unencodedLen, uint32_t bufLen, uint32_t notecardOffset)
memberdef.name: NoteBinaryStoreTransmit

memberdef.argsstring: (JTIME secondsUTC, int offset, char *zone, char *country, char *area)
memberdef.name: NoteTimeSet

memberdef.argsstring: (uint16_t *retYear, uint8_t *retMonth, uint8_t *retDay, uint8_t *retHour, uint8_t *retMinute, uint8_t *retSecond, char **retWeekday, char **retZone)
memberdef.name: NoteLocalTimeST

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *variable, const char *defaultVal, char *buf, uint32_t buflen)
memberdef.name: NoteGetEnv

memberdef.argsstring: (char *productBuf, int productBufLen, char *serviceBuf, int serviceBufLen, char *deviceBuf, int deviceBufLen, char *snBuf, int snBufLen)
memberdef.name: NoteGetServiceConfig

memberdef.argsstring: (char *productBuf, int productBufLen, char *serviceBuf, int serviceBufLen, char *deviceBuf, int deviceBufLen, char *snBuf, int snBufLen)
memberdef.name: NoteGetServiceConfigST

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *uploadMode, int uploadMinutes, int downloadMinutes, bool align, bool sync)
memberdef.name: NoteSetSyncMode

memberdef.argsstring: (char *nameBuf, int nameBufLen, char *orgBuf, int orgBufLen, char *roleBuf, int roleBufLen, char *emailBuf, int emailBufLen)
memberdef.name: NoteGetContact

memberdef.argsstring: (NotePayloadDesc *desc, const char segtype[NP_SEGTYPE_LEN], void *pdata, uint32_t plen)
memberdef.name: NotePayloadAddSegment

memberdef.argsstring: (NotePayloadDesc *desc, const char segtype[NP_SEGTYPE_LEN], void *pdata, uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: NotePayloadGetSegment

detaileddescription.para: Written by Ray Ozzie and Blues Inc. team.
Copyright (c) 2019 Blues Inc. MIT License. Use of this source code is governed by licenses granted by the copyright holder including that found in the LICENSE file.
This library bundles the cJSON JSON parser library.
